items.title: Google Updates Workspace to Make AI Your New Office Intern
items.summary: Google is integrating advanced AI features into Workspace, positioning AI as a new 'office intern' to automate tasks and enhance productivity for users.

items.title: Anthropic's Most Dangerous Model Just Got Accessed by People Who Weren't Supposed to Have It
items.summary: Reports indicate that Anthropic's highly sensitive AI model has been accessed by unauthorized individuals, raising significant concerns about AI security and control.

items.title: Google Launches Two Specialized TPUs for the Agentic Era
items.summary: Google announces the release of two new specialized TPUs, the 8T and 8I, designed to accelerate the development and deployment of advanced AI agents in the cloud.

items.title: Tstars-Tryon 1.0: Robust and Realistic Virtual Try-On for Diverse Fashion Items
items.summary: Researchers introduce Tstars-Tryon 1.0, a new model offering robust and realistic virtual try-on capabilities for a wide range of fashion items, pushing the boundaries of AI in e-commerce.

items.title: Making ChatGPT Better for Clinicians
items.summary: OpenAI is focusing on tailoring ChatGPT's capabilities to better serve clinicians, aiming to improve its utility and accuracy in medical and healthcare contexts.

items.title: CoInteract: Physically-Consistent Human-Object Interaction Video Synthesis via Spatially-Structured Co-Generation
items.summary: A new research paper introduces CoInteract, a method for synthesizing physically-consistent videos of human-object interactions using spatially-structured co-generation.

items.title: AgentSPEX: An Agent SPecification and EXecution Language
items.summary: Researchers propose AgentSPEX, a novel language designed for specifying and executing AI agents, aiming to streamline the development and deployment of autonomous systems.

items.title: Hands-on with X’s New AI-Powered Custom Feeds
items.summary: X (formerly Twitter) is rolling out new AI-powered custom feeds, allowing users to personalize their content consumption experience with advanced recommendation algorithms.

items.title: Turn Your Best AI Prompts into One-Click Tools in Chrome
items.summary: Google Chrome is introducing a new feature that allows users to convert their most effective AI prompts into one-click tools, enhancing accessibility and efficiency for AI interactions.

items.title: Speeding Up Agentic Workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
items.summary: OpenAI is enhancing its Responses API with WebSockets to significantly speed up agentic workflows, enabling more responsive and efficient AI agent interactions.

items.title: AI Made Devs Feel 20% Faster But Measured 19% Slower: Nobody's Ready for That Conversation
items.summary: A new discussion highlights a perplexing trend where AI tools make developers feel more productive, yet objective metrics show a decrease in actual speed, sparking debate on AI's true impact on developer efficiency.

items.title: If AI Existed in 2011, Would We Still Have the Modern Web?
items.summary: This thought-provoking article explores how the web's evolution might have differed if advanced AI technologies were prevalent in 2011, questioning the trajectory of modern web development.

items.title: AnyRecon: Arbitrary-View 3D Reconstruction with Video Diffusion Model
items.summary: AnyRecon presents a novel approach to arbitrary-view 3D reconstruction by leveraging video diffusion models, offering new possibilities for generating 3D content from diverse video inputs.

items.title: I Built My Own Event Bus for a Sustainability App — Here's What I Learned About Agent Automation Using OpenClaw
items.summary: A developer shares insights from building an event bus for a sustainability application, detailing lessons learned about implementing agent automation with the OpenClaw framework.

items.title: TEMPO: Scaling Test-time Training for Large Reasoning Models
items.summary: TEMPO introduces a new method for scaling test-time training, specifically designed to improve the performance and adaptability of large reasoning models.
